Title: One-click payment with CVN
Content:
Including the Card Verification Number (CVN) is crucial for successful card transactions. While often optional, providing the CVN significantly improves approval rates, especially for European cards which commonly decline without it. To facilitate secure, one-click payments, you can enable end-users to reuse their stored card details while still requiring CVN and authentication for every transaction.

One-click payment flow

Once a card is stored, you can use the payment_token_id for future payments. For added security, your customers may be required to re-enter their CVN during one-click payments, ensuring compliance and reducing fraud risk.

Private notes

sequenceDiagram
 actor EndUser as End User
 participant Client as Client App
 participant Server as Client Server
 participant cardsessionjs as Xendit card_session.js
 participant XenditServer as Xendit Server
 participant Authentication Page as Authentication Page
 EndUser ->> Client: Choose stored card for payment
 Client ->> Server: Checkout using stored card
 Server ->> XenditServer: Create Payment Session with the Payment Token ID
 XenditServer ->> Server: Return Payment Session
 Server ->> Client: Send Payment Session ID
 Client ->> Client : Initiate card_session.js using Payment Session ID
 EndUser ->> Client: Input CVV
 Client ->> cardsessionjs: Send CVV
 cardsessionjs ->> Client: Return authentication url and the payment_request_id
 Client ->> Authentication Page: Redirect to issuer authentication page
 Authentication Page ->> Authentication Page: User completes payment process
 Client ->> Server: Send payment_request_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_request_id
 Authentication Page ->> Client: Redirect back to your app
 XenditServer -->> Server: Send payment webhook
 Server ->> Server: Match payment webhook with the payment_request_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_id for the payment_request_id
 Server -->> Client: Send payment result

How to Implement

  1. Create a payment session

    Initiate a payment session by sending a POST request to the /sessions endpoint. This request should include the card_payment_token_id of the stored card.

    Request - POST /sessions

    {
    "reference_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "amount": 100000,
    "currency": "IDR",
    "country": "ID",
    "customer": {
        "reference_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Jaap",
            "surname": "Stam"
        }
    },
    "cards_session_js": {
        "card_payment_token_id":"pt-a15a6c28-c65a-4ede-a6cc-10ff3b1d093e",
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

    Response - POST /sessions

    {
    "payment_session_id": "ps-6746c1006b7752b4d91725af",
    "created": "2024-11-27T06:49:36.535Z",
    "updated": "2024-11-27T06:49:36.535Z",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "reference_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "amount": 10000,
    "country": "ID",
    "customer_id": "XENDIT_GENERATED_CUSTOMER_ID",
    "expires_at": "2024-11-27T07:19:36.434Z",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "locale": "en",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID", 
    "cards_session_js": {
        "card_payment_token_id":"pt-a15a6c28-c65a-4ede-a6cc-10ff3b1d093e",
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

  1. Collect the CVN

Implement {{variable.card_session_js}} in the head element of your payment page 

<head>
     <script type="text/javascript" src="https://js.xendit.co/cards-session.min.js">
</head>

Then, collect the CVN information

<head>
    <script type="text/javascript" src="https://js.xendit.co/cards-session.min.js">
</head>

<body>
    <div class="credit-card-form">
        <form id="credit-card-form">
            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="cvn">CVN</label>
                <input type="text" id="cvn" name="cvn" placeholder="123" />
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
    <script type="text/javascript">

    </script>
</body>

Request - to card_session_js 

{
    "cvn": "123",
    "payment_session_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_SESSION_ID"
}

Response - from card_session_js

{ 
    "message": "Status updated. Wait for a callback or get the status using the Get API.", 
    "payment_request_id": "PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID", 
    "action_url": "AUTHENTICATION_PAGE_URL" 
}

Important: Store the payment_request_id as it is crucial for tracking the transaction status and will be included in the payment webhook.

3. Redirect to the authentication page

Redirect your customer to the authentication page provided by the action_url from the response object. This is where the cardholder completes the 3D Secure authentication.

4. Customer completes authentication

After successfully authenticating, your customer will be redirected to your success_return_url. If authentication fails, they will be redirected to your cancel_return_url.

5. Receive the webhook

Xendit will send a payment webhook to your configured webhook endpoint, indicating the final status of the transaction. You can match this webhook with the payment_request_id you stored earlier.

Example payment.capture webhook

{
    "created": "2024-12-18T05:46:35.109Z",
    "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
    "event": "payment.capture",
    "data": {
        "type": "PAY",
        "status": "SUCCEEDED",
        "country": "ID",
        "created": "2024-12-18T05:46:08.192Z",
        "updated": "2024-12-18T05:46:30.627Z",
        "captures": [
            {
                "capture_id": "cptr-08f17fa3-e80c-4d8e-8c34-17aa3400bc1c",
                "capture_amount": 10000,
                "capture_timestamp": "2024-12-18T05:46:34.234Z"
            }
        ],
        "currency": "IDR",
        "payment_id": "py-3f57d678-2448-4c9f-a433-8468d366fb5c",
        "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
        "customer_id": "cust-7de9a9b4-37e8-40ad-b665-d97f42e538c5",
        "channel_code": "CARDS",
        "reference_id": "97ba0a32-b996-4abf-8a7b-6184a6644676_b8d18f2f-3",
        "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
        "request_amount": 10000,
        "payment_details": {
            "authorization_data": {
                "reconciliation_id": "7345007929096981703954",
                "authorization_code": "831000",
                "acquirer_merchant_id": "xendit_ctv_agg",
                "network_response_code": "00",
                "network_transaction_id": "016153570198200",
                "cvn_verification_result": "M",
                "retrieval_reference_number": "435205253972",
                "address_verification_result": "M",
                "network_response_code_descriptor": "Approved and completed sucessfully"
            },
            "authentication_data": {
                "flow": "CHALLENGE",
                "a_res": {
                    "eci": "05",
                    "message_version": "2.1.0",
                    "authentication_value": "AAIBBYNoEwAAACcKhAJkdQAAAAA=","directory_server_trans_id": "e537f539-d59f-4ebe-8d56-7fdc31a8e9b4"
                }
            }
        },
        "payment_request_id": "pr-5593127f-8c7b-4d2f-b487-c785ffc21e2f"
    },
    "api_version": "v3"
}

It's recommended to save the payment_id and payment_details from the webhook, correlated with the payment_request_id, as proof of payment.

Example implementation

For a practical demonstration of collecting CVN using card_session.js on your frontend, refer to our example page:

🔗 card_session.js example to collect CVN

Title: One-click payment dengan CVN
Content:
Untuk meningkatkan keberhasilan transaksi, penting untuk menyertakan Card Verification Number (CVN). Meskipun seringkali opsional, memberikan CVN secara signifikan meningkatkan tingkat keberhasilan, terutama untuk kartu-kartu Eropa yang umumnya akan ditolak jika tidak disertakan. Untuk memfasilitasi pembayaran satu-klik yang aman, Anda dapat memungkinkan pengguna akhir untuk menggunakan kembali detail kartu mereka yang tersimpan sambil tetap meminta CVN dan otentikasi untuk setiap transaksi.

Alur one-click payment

Setelah kartu disimpan, Anda dapat menggunakan payment_token_id untuk pembayaran di masa mendatang. Untuk keamanan tambahan, pelanggan Anda mungkin diminta untuk memasukkan kembali CVN mereka selama pembayaran sekali klik, memastikan kepatuhan dan mengurangi risiko penipuan.

Catatan pribadi

sequenceDiagram
 actor EndUser as End User
 participant Client as Client App
 participant Server as Client Server
 participant cardsessionjs as Xendit card_session.js
 participant XenditServer as Xendit Server
 participant Authentication Page as Authentication Page
 EndUser ->> Client: Choose stored card for payment
 Client ->> Server: Checkout using stored card
 Server ->> XenditServer: Create Payment Session with the Payment Token ID
 XenditServer ->> Server: Return Payment Session
 Server ->> Client: Send Payment Session ID
 Client ->> Client : Initiate card_session.js using Payment Session ID
 EndUser ->> Client: Input CVV
 Client ->> cardsessionjs: Send CVV
 cardsessionjs ->> Client: Return authentication url and the payment_request_id
 Client ->> Authentication Page: Redirect to issuer authentication page
 Authentication Page ->> Authentication Page: User completes payment process
 Client ->> Server: Send payment_request_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_request_id
 Authentication Page ->> Client: Redirect back to your app
 XenditServer -->> Server: Send payment webhook
 Server ->> Server: Match payment webhook with the payment_request_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_id for the payment_request_id
 Server -->> Client: Send payment result

Cara Menerapkan

  1. Buat payment session

    Bsesi payment session dengan mengirim request POST ke endpoint /sessions. Request ini harus menyertakan card_payment_token_id dari kartu yang disimpan.

Request - POST /session

{
    "reference_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "amount": 100000,
    "currency": "IDR",
    "country": "ID",
    "customer": {
        "reference_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Jaap",
            "surname": "Stam"
        }
    },
    "cards_session_js": {
        "card_payment_token_id":"pt-a15a6c28-c65a-4ede-a6cc-10ff3b1d093e",
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

Tanggapan - POST /sesi

{
    "payment_session_id": "ps-6746c1006b7752b4d91725af",
    "created": "2024-11-27T06:49:36.535Z",
    "updated": "2024-11-27T06:49:36.535Z",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "reference_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "amount": 10000,
    "country": "ID",
    "customer_id": "XENDIT_GENERATED_CUSTOMER_ID",
    "expires_at": "2024-11-27T07:19:36.434Z",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "locale": "en",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID", 
    "cards_session_js": {
        "card_payment_token_id":"pt-a15a6c28-c65a-4ede-a6cc-10ff3b1d093e",
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

  1. Kumpulkan CVN

Terapkan {{variable.card_session_js}} di elemen header halaman pembayaran Anda

<head>
     <script type="text/javascript" src="https://js.xendit.co/cards-session.min.js">
</head>

Kemudian, kumpulkan informasi CVN

<head>
    <script type="text/javascript" src="https://js.xendit.co/cards-session.min.js">
</head>

<body>
    <div class="credit-card-form">
        <form id="credit-card-form">
            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="cvn">CVN</label>
                <input type="text" id="cvn" name="cvn" placeholder="123" />
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
    <script type="text/javascript">

    </script>
</body>

Request - untuk card_session_js 

{
    "cvn": "123",
    "payment_session_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_SESSION_ID"
}

Response - dari card_session_js

{ 
    "message": "Status updated. Wait for a callback or get the status using the Get API.", 
    "payment_request_id": "PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID", 
    "action_url": "AUTHENTICATION_PAGE_URL" 
}

Penting: Simpan payment_request_id . Anda akan memerlukannya untuk mengambil status transaksi dan akan disertakan dalam webhook pembayaran untuk pembaruan status.

3. Alihkan ke halaman autentikasi

Alihkan pembeli ke halaman autentikasi yang disediakan oleh action_url objek respons dari pembeli. Di sinilah pemegang kartu menyelesaikan otentikasi 3D Secure.

4. Pembeli menyelesaikan autentikasi

Setelah berhasil mengautentikasi, pembeli akan diarahkan ke success_return_url . Jika otentikasi gagal, autentikasi akan dialihkan ke cancel_return_url.

5. Terima webhook

Xendit akan mengirimkan webhook pembayaran ke titik akhir webhook Anda yang dikonfigurasi, menunjukkan status akhir transaksi. Anda dapat mencocokkan webhook ini dengan yang payment_request_id Anda simpan sebelumnya.

Contoh webhook payment.capture

{
    "created": "2024-12-18T05:46:35.109Z",
    "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
    "event": "payment.capture",
    "data": {
        "type": "PAY",
        "status": "SUCCEEDED",
        "country": "ID",
        "created": "2024-12-18T05:46:08.192Z",
        "updated": "2024-12-18T05:46:30.627Z",
        "captures": [
            {
                "capture_id": "cptr-08f17fa3-e80c-4d8e-8c34-17aa3400bc1c",
                "capture_amount": 10000,
                "capture_timestamp": "2024-12-18T05:46:34.234Z"
            }
        ],
        "currency": "IDR",
        "payment_id": "py-3f57d678-2448-4c9f-a433-8468d366fb5c",
        "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
        "customer_id": "cust-7de9a9b4-37e8-40ad-b665-d97f42e538c5",
        "channel_code": "CARDS",
        "reference_id": "97ba0a32-b996-4abf-8a7b-6184a6644676_b8d18f2f-3",
        "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
        "request_amount": 10000,
        "payment_details": {
            "authorization_data": {
                "reconciliation_id": "7345007929096981703954",
                "authorization_code": "831000",
                "acquirer_merchant_id": "xendit_ctv_agg",
                "network_response_code": "00",
                "network_transaction_id": "016153570198200",
                "cvn_verification_result": "M",
                "retrieval_reference_number": "435205253972",
                "address_verification_result": "M",
                "network_response_code_descriptor": "Approved and completed sucessfully"
            },
            "authentication_data": {
                "flow": "CHALLENGE",
                "a_res": {
                    "eci": "05",
                    "message_version": "2.1.0",
                    "authentication_value": "AAIBBYNoEwAAACcKhAJkdQAAAAA=","directory_server_trans_id": "e537f539-d59f-4ebe-8d56-7fdc31a8e9b4"
                }
            }
        },
        "payment_request_id": "pr-5593127f-8c7b-4d2f-b487-c785ffc21e2f"
    },
    "api_version": "v3"
}

Kami sarankan untuk menyimpan payment_id dan payment_details dari webhook, yang berkorelasi dengan payment_request_id, sebagai bukti pembayaran.

Contoh implementasi

Anda dapat melihat contoh penerapan penggunaan card_session.js di frontend Anda untuk mengumpulkan detail kartu di sini:

🔗 card_session.js example to collect CVN

Title: การชำระเงินในคลิกเดียวด้วย CVN
Content:
การรวม Card Verification Number (CVN) เป็นสิ่งสำคัญอย่างยิ่งสำหรับธุรกรรมบัตรที่สำเร็จ แม้ว่ามักจะเป็นทางเลือก แต่การระบุ CVN จะช่วยปรับปรุงอัตราการอนุมัติได้อย่างมาก โดยเฉพาะอย่างยิ่งสำหรับบัตรในยุโรปซึ่งมักจะถูกปฏิเสธหากไม่มี CVN เพื่ออำนวยความสะดวกในการชำระเงินแบบคลิกเดียวที่ปลอดภัย คุณสามารถเปิดใช้งานให้ผู้ใช้ปลายทางนำรายละเอียดบัตรที่บันทึกไว้กลับมาใช้ใหม่ได้ โดยยังคงต้องระบุ CVN และการยืนยันตัวตน (authentication) สำหรับทุกธุรกรรม

ขั้นตอนการชำระเงินแบบคลิกเดียว (One-click payment flow)

เมื่อมีการบันทึกบัตรแล้ว คุณสามารถใช้ payment_token_id สำหรับการชำระเงินในอนาคตได้ เพื่อความปลอดภัยที่เพิ่มขึ้น ลูกค้าของคุณอาจถูกกำหนดให้ป้อน CVN ซ้ำในระหว่างการชำระเงินแบบคลิกเดียว ซึ่งช่วยให้มั่นใจว่าเป็นไปตามข้อกำหนดและลดความเสี่ยงจากการฉ้อโกง

บันทึกส่วนตัว

sequenceDiagram
 actor EndUser as End User
 participant Client as Client App
 participant Server as Client Server
 participant cardsessionjs as Xendit card_session.js
 participant XenditServer as Xendit Server
 participant Authentication Page as Authentication Page
 EndUser ->> Client: Choose stored card for payment
 Client ->> Server: Checkout using stored card
 Server ->> XenditServer: Create Payment Session with the Payment Token ID
 XenditServer ->> Server: Return Payment Session
 Server ->> Client: Send Payment Session ID
 Client ->> Client : Initiate card_session.js using Payment Session ID
 EndUser ->> Client: Input CVV
 Client ->> cardsessionjs: Send CVV
 cardsessionjs ->> Client: Return authentication url and the payment_request_id
 Client ->> Authentication Page: Redirect to issuer authentication page
 Authentication Page ->> Authentication Page: User completes payment process
 Client ->> Server: Send payment_request_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_request_id
 Authentication Page ->> Client: Redirect back to your app
 XenditServer -->> Server: Send payment webhook
 Server ->> Server: Match payment webhook with the payment_request_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_id for the payment_request_id
 Server -->> Client: Send payment result

วิธีการนำไปใช้งาน

  1. 1. สร้าง Payment Session

    เริ่มต้น Payment Session โดยการส่ง POST request ไปยัง /sessions endpoint request นี้ควรรวม card_payment_token_id ของบัตรที่บันทึกไว้

    Request - POST /sessions

    {
    "reference_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "amount": 100000,
    "currency": "IDR",
    "country": "ID",
    "customer": {
        "reference_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Jaap",
            "surname": "Stam"
        }
    },
    "cards_session_js": {
        "card_payment_token_id":"pt-a15a6c28-c65a-4ede-a6cc-10ff3b1d093e",
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

    Response - POST /sessions

    {
    "payment_session_id": "ps-6746c1006b7752b4d91725af",
    "created": "2024-11-27T06:49:36.535Z",
    "updated": "2024-11-27T06:49:36.535Z",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "reference_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "amount": 10000,
    "country": "ID",
    "customer_id": "XENDIT_GENERATED_CUSTOMER_ID",
    "expires_at": "2024-11-27T07:19:36.434Z",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "locale": "en",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID", 
    "cards_session_js": {
        "card_payment_token_id":"pt-a15a6c28-c65a-4ede-a6cc-10ff3b1d093e",
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

  1. 2. รวบรวม CVN

นำ {{variable.card_session_js}} ไปใช้งานใน head element ของหน้าชำระเงินของคุณ 

<head>
     <script type="text/javascript" src="https://js.xendit.co/cards-session.min.js">
</head>

จากนั้น รวบรวมข้อมูล CVN

<head>
    <script type="text/javascript" src="https://js.xendit.co/cards-session.min.js">
</head>

<body>
    <div class="credit-card-form">
        <form id="credit-card-form">
            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="cvn">CVN</label>
                <input type="text" id="cvn" name="cvn" placeholder="123" />
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
    <script type="text/javascript">

    </script>
</body>

Request - ไปยัง card_session_js 

{
    "cvn": "123",
    "payment_session_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_SESSION_ID"
}

Response - จาก card_session_js

{ 
    "message": "Status updated. Wait for a callback or get the status using the Get API.", 
    "payment_request_id": "PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID", 
    "action_url": "AUTHENTICATION_PAGE_URL" 
}

สำคัญ: บันทึก payment_request_id เนื่องจากมีความสำคัญอย่างยิ่งสำหรับการติดตามสถานะธุรกรรม และจะถูกรวมอยู่ใน payment webhook

3. เปลี่ยนเส้นทางไปยังหน้ายืนยันตัวตน

เปลี่ยนเส้นทางลูกค้าของคุณไปยัง หน้ายืนยันตัวตน (authentication page) ที่ระบุโดย action_url จาก response object นี่คือจุดที่ผู้ถือบัตรทำการยืนยันตัวตน 3D Secure ให้เสร็จสมบูรณ์

4. ลูกค้าทำการยืนยันตัวตนเสร็จสมบูรณ์

หลังจากยืนยันตัวตนสำเร็จ ลูกค้าของคุณจะถูกเปลี่ยนเส้นทางไปยัง success_return_url ของคุณ หากการยืนยันตัวตนล้มเหลว ลูกค้าจะถูกเปลี่ยนเส้นทางไปยัง cancel_return_url ของคุณ

5. รับ webhook

Xendit จะส่ง payment webhook ไปยัง webhook endpoint ที่คุณกำหนดค่าไว้ เพื่อระบุสถานะสุดท้ายของธุรกรรม คุณสามารถจับคู่ webhook นี้กับ payment_request_id ที่คุณบันทึกไว้ก่อนหน้านี้

ตัวอย่าง payment.capture webhook

{
    "created": "2024-12-18T05:46:35.109Z",
    "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
    "event": "payment.capture",
    "data": {
        "type": "PAY",
        "status": "SUCCEEDED",
        "country": "ID",
        "created": "2024-12-18T05:46:08.192Z",
        "updated": "2024-12-18T05:46:30.627Z",
        "captures": [
            {
                "capture_id": "cptr-08f17fa3-e80c-4d8e-8c34-17aa3400bc1c",
                "capture_amount": 10000,
                "capture_timestamp": "2024-12-18T05:46:34.234Z"
            }
        ],
        "currency": "IDR",
        "payment_id": "py-3f57d678-2448-4c9f-a433-8468d366fb5c",
        "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
        "customer_id": "cust-7de9a9b4-37e8-40ad-b665-d97f42e538c5",
        "channel_code": "CARDS",
        "reference_id": "97ba0a32-b996-4abf-8a7b-6184a6644676_b8d18f2f-3",
        "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
        "request_amount": 10000,
        "payment_details": {
            "authorization_data": {
                "reconciliation_id": "7345007929096981703954",
                "authorization_code": "831000",
                "acquirer_merchant_id": "xendit_ctv_agg",
                "network_response_code": "00",
                "network_transaction_id": "016153570198200",
                "cvn_verification_result": "M",
                "retrieval_reference_number": "435205253972",
                "address_verification_result": "M",
                "network_response_code_descriptor": "Approved and completed sucessfully"
            },
            "authentication_data": {
                "flow": "CHALLENGE",
                "a_res": {
                    "eci": "05",
                    "message_version": "2.1.0",
                    "authentication_value": "AAIBBYNoEwAAACcKhAJkdQAAAAA=","directory_server_trans_id": "e537f539-d59f-4ebe-8d56-7fdc31a8e9b4"
                }
            }
        },
        "payment_request_id": "pr-5593127f-8c7b-4d2f-b487-c785ffc21e2f"
    },
    "api_version": "v3"
}

ขอแนะนำให้บันทึก payment_id และ payment_details จาก webhook ที่สัมพันธ์กับ payment_request_id เพื่อเป็นหลักฐานการชำระเงิน

ตัวอย่างการนำไปใช้งาน

สำหรับการสาธิตการรวบรวม CVN โดยใช้ card_session.js บน frontend ของคุณ โปรดดูหน้าตัวอย่างของเรา:

🔗 ตัวอย่าง card_session.js สำหรับรวบรวม CVN
SeoTitle: การชำระเงินในคลิกเดียวด้วย CVN

Title: Pago con un solo clic con CVN
Content:
Incluir el Número de Verificación de Tarjeta (CVN) es crucial para que las Transacciones con tarjeta sean exitosas. Aunque a menudo es opcional, proporcionar el CVN mejora significativamente las tasas de aprobación, especialmente para las tarjetas europeas que comúnmente son rechazadas sin él. Para facilitar los pagos seguros de un solo clic, usted puede permitir que los usuarios finales reutilicen los detalles de su tarjeta almacenada, mientras que sigue siendo obligatorio el CVN y la authentication para cada Transacción.

Flujo de pago de un solo clic

Una vez que una tarjeta está almacenada, usted puede usar el payment_token_id para futuros pagos. Para mayor seguridad, se puede requerir a sus Clientes que vuelvan a ingresar su CVN durante los pagos de un solo clic, asegurando el cumplimiento y reduciendo el riesgo de fraude.

Notas privadas

sequenceDiagram
 actor EndUser as End User
 participant Client as Client App
 participant Server as Client Server
 participant cardsessionjs as Xendit card_session.js
 participant XenditServer as Xendit Server
 participant Authentication Page as Authentication Page
 EndUser ->> Client: Choose stored card for payment
 Client ->> Server: Checkout using stored card
 Server ->> XenditServer: Create Payment Session with the Payment Token ID
 XenditServer ->> Server: Return Payment Session
 Server ->> Client: Send Payment Session ID
 Client ->> Client : Initiate card_session.js using Payment Session ID
 EndUser ->> Client: Input CVV
 Client ->> cardsessionjs: Send CVV
 cardsessionjs ->> Client: Return authentication url and the payment_request_id
 Client ->> Authentication Page: Redirect to issuer authentication page
 Authentication Page ->> Authentication Page: User completes payment process
 Client ->> Server: Send payment_request_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_request_id
 Authentication Page ->> Client: Redirect back to your app
 XenditServer -->> Server: Send payment webhook
 Server ->> Server: Match payment webhook with the payment_request_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_id for the payment_request_id
 Server -->> Client: Send payment result

Cómo Implementar

  1. Crear una Payment Session

    Inicie una Payment Session enviando un request POST al endpoint /sessions. Este request debe incluir el card_payment_token_id de la tarjeta almacenada.

    Request - POST /sessions

    {
    "reference_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "amount": 100000,
    "currency": "IDR",
    "country": "ID",
    "customer": {
        "reference_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Jaap",
            "surname": "Stam"
        }
    },
    "cards_session_js": {
        "card_payment_token_id":"pt-a15a6c28-c65a-4ede-a6cc-10ff3b1d093e",
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

    Response - POST /sessions

    {
    "payment_session_id": "ps-6746c1006b7752b4d91725af",
    "created": "2024-11-27T06:49:36.535Z",
    "updated": "2024-11-27T06:49:36.535Z",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "reference_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "amount": 10000,
    "country": "ID",
    "customer_id": "XENDIT_GENERATED_CUSTOMER_ID",
    "expires_at": "2024-11-27T07:19:36.434Z",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "locale": "en",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID", 
    "cards_session_js": {
        "card_payment_token_id":"pt-a15a6c28-c65a-4ede-a6cc-10ff3b1d093e",
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

  1. Recopilar el CVN

Implemente {{variable.card_session_js}} en el elemento head de su página de pago 

<head>
     <script type="text/javascript" src="https://js.xendit.co/cards-session.min.js">
</head>

Luego, recopile la información del CVN

<head>
    <script type="text/javascript" src="https://js.xendit.co/cards-session.min.js">
</head>

<body>
    <div class="credit-card-form">
        <form id="credit-card-form">
            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="cvn">CVN</label>
                <input type="text" id="cvn" name="cvn" placeholder="123" />
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
    <script type="text/javascript">

    </script>
</body>

Request - to card_session_js 

{
    "cvn": "123",
    "payment_session_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_SESSION_ID"
}

Response - from card_session_js

{ 
    "message": "Status updated. Wait for a callback or get the status using the Get API.", 
    "payment_request_id": "PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID", 
    "action_url": "AUTHENTICATION_PAGE_URL" 
}

Importante: Almacene el payment_request_id ya que es crucial para rastrear el Estado de la Transacción y se incluirá en el payment webhook.

3. Redirigir a la página de authentication

Redirija a su Cliente a la página de authentication proporcionada por el action_url del object response. Aquí es donde el titular de la tarjeta completa la authentication 3D Secure.

4. El Cliente completa la authentication

Después de autenticarse exitosamente, su Cliente será redirigido a su success_return_url. Si la authentication falla, será redirigido a su cancel_return_url.

5. Recibir el webhook

Xendit enviará un payment webhook a su endpoint de webhook configurado, indicando el Estado final de la Transacción. Usted puede hacer coincidir este webhook con el payment_request_id que almacenó anteriormente.

Ejemplo de payment.capture webhook

{
    "created": "2024-12-18T05:46:35.109Z",
    "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
    "event": "payment.capture",
    "data": {
        "type": "PAY",
        "status": "SUCCEEDED",
        "country": "ID",
        "created": "2024-12-18T05:46:08.192Z",
        "updated": "2024-12-18T05:46:30.627Z",
        "captures": [
            {
                "capture_id": "cptr-08f17fa3-e80c-4d8e-8c34-17aa3400bc1c",
                "capture_amount": 10000,
                "capture_timestamp": "2024-12-18T05:46:34.234Z"
            }
        ],
        "currency": "IDR",
        "payment_id": "py-3f57d678-2448-4c9f-a433-8468d366fb5c",
        "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
        "customer_id": "cust-7de9a9b4-37e8-40ad-b665-d97f42e538c5",
        "channel_code": "CARDS",
        "reference_id": "97ba0a32-b996-4abf-8a7b-6184a6644676_b8d18f2f-3",
        "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
        "request_amount": 10000,
        "payment_details": {
            "authorization_data": {
                "reconciliation_id": "7345007929096981703954",
                "authorization_code": "831000",
                "acquirer_merchant_id": "xendit_ctv_agg",
                "network_response_code": "00",
                "network_transaction_id": "016153570198200",
                "cvn_verification_result": "M",
                "retrieval_reference_number": "435205253972",
                "address_verification_result": "M",
                "network_response_code_descriptor": "Approved and completed sucessfully"
            },
            "authentication_data": {
                "flow": "CHALLENGE",
                "a_res": {
                    "eci": "05",
                    "message_version": "2.1.0",
                    "authentication_value": "AAIBBYNoEwAAACcKhAJkdQAAAAA=","directory_server_trans_id": "e537f539-d59f-4ebe-8d56-7fdc31a8e9b4"
                }
            }
        },
        "payment_request_id": "pr-5593127f-8c7b-4d2f-b487-c785ffc21e2f"
    },
    "api_version": "v3"
}

Se recomienda guardar el payment_id y los payment_details del webhook, correlacionados con el payment_request_id, como prueba de Pago.

Ejemplo de implementación

Para una demostración práctica de cómo recopilar el CVN usando card_session.js en su frontend, consulte nuestra página de ejemplo:

🔗 Ejemplo de card_session.js para recopilar CVN
SeoTitle: Pago con un solo clic con CVN
